visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a medium close-up of a young woman with long, straight dark hair and fair skin. She is wearing a soft, mauve-colored long-sleeved top with a draped cowl neckline. She holds the camera in a selfie position, looking directly into the lens. The setting appears to be an indoor bedroom or hotel room, characterized by warm, dim lighting and a bed with white pillows and a wooden headboard in the background. (2) As she speaks, her facial expressions are animated, with frequent mouth movements and subtle shifts in her gaze. The camera remains mostly static, though it exhibits the slight shakiness typical of handheld selfie filming. Her hand gestures are minimal, mostly staying out of the lower frame. (3) The lighting remains consistent throughout, casting a soft glow on her face and highlighting the warm tones of the room. The background remains unchanged, showing the corner of a bed and a wall lamp providing soft illumination. (4) The video concludes with her leaning slightly toward the camera to deliver a final remark before the frame cuts to a solid black screen with white text overlays representing the punchline.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 我媽叫我過年. (2) [Subtitle]: 帶男朋友回家. (3) [Subtitle]: 我跟她說. (4) [Subtitle]: 已經分了💔. (5) [Subtitle]: 我媽…. (6) [Subtitle]: 問我為什麼那麼快分?!. (7) [Subtitle]: 我也沒辦法啊 😩. (8) [Subtitle]: 因為他說我. (9) [Subtitle]: 逼太緊

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator filming in selfie mode.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a mauve long-sleeved draped top and makeup.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A domestic indoor setting featuring a bed with white bedding, a wooden headboard, and warm wall-mounted lighting.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A solo female voice is heard speaking in Traditional Chinese (Mandarin). Her tone is conversational and casual, with a moderate pace and clear articulation. The background is quiet, suggesting a controlled indoor environment with minimal ambient noise. (2) As she recounts her story, the voice exhibits natural inflection and emotional nuances, reflecting a slightly humorous and storytelling tone. There are no background music or sound effects present, focusing entirely on her vocal delivery. (3) The vocal track remains consistent in volume and quality throughout the video. A brief pause occurs between sentences for dramatic effect. (4) The recording concludes with the final spoken phrase, followed by a sudden cut to silence as the video ends.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To share a humorous personal anecdote about a breakup and a conversation with the creator's mother, culminating in a pun/double entendre that serves as a comedic punchline.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video relies heavily on the creator's vocal delivery and on-screen text to deliver a short-form comedy bit. The pun at the end is the primary draw for engagement.
